error.cannot_fetch_household: Could not fetch households from Joulzen. Please check your connection and try again.

abort.no_household: Currently, no household is connected to your profile. Please ask your administrator to grant you access, or contact Joulzen support.

select_household.title: Household Selection
select_household.description: Choose the household you want to integrate.

select_components.title: Optional: Publish to Joulzen
select_components.description: Check the components for which you want to select Home Assistant entity overrides. The selected entities are then periodically published to Joulzen and used there for display and optimisation.

ct_grid.title: Grid
ct_grid.description: Map Home Assistant entities to grid connection fields.

ct_energyCommunity.title: Energy Community
ct_energyCommunity.description: Map Home Assistant entities to energy community fields.

ct_pv.title: Solar PV
ct_pv.description: Map Home Assistant entities to solar PV fields.

ct_battery.title: Battery
ct_battery.description: Map Home Assistant entities to battery storage fields.

ct_appliance.title: Appliance
ct_appliance.description: Map Home Assistant entities to appliance consumption fields.

ct_heater.title: Heat Pump / Heater
ct_heater.description: Map Home Assistant entities to heat pump or heater fields.

ct_districtHeating.title: District Heating
ct_districtHeating.description: Map Home Assistant entities to district heating fields.

ct_joulzenTank.title: Joulzen Tank
ct_joulzenTank.description: Map Home Assistant entities to thermal storage tank fields.

ct_tankLayer.title: Tank Layer
ct_tankLayer.description: Map Home Assistant entities to tank layer temperature fields.

ct_thermostat.title: Thermostat
ct_thermostat.description: Map Home Assistant entities to thermostat fields.

ct_ev.title: Electric Vehicle
ct_ev.description: Map Home Assistant entities to EV charging fields.

ct_weather.title: Weather Station
ct_weather.description: Map Home Assistant entities to weather observation fields.

ct_heatingCircuit.title: Heating Circuit
ct_heatingCircuit.description: Map Home Assistant entities to heating circuit fields.
